# Scenario: cursor position after streaming → idle refresh
#
# Verifies that when the user is reading messages (cursor in message
# area), session.idle + refresh does NOT snap cursor to the input area.
# The cursor should stay in the message area where the user left it.

:session ses_cursor_idle
:directory /tmp/test-cursor

:api GET /session/ses_cursor_idle/message 200 [{"info":{"id":"msg_user1","sessionID":"ses_cursor_idle","role":"user","time":{"created":500000}},"parts":[{"id":"prt_u1","sessionID":"ses_cursor_idle","messageID":"msg_user1","type":"text","text":"hello","time":{"start":500000,"end":500001}}]},{"info":{"id":"msg_asst1","sessionID":"ses_cursor_idle","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1000000},"modelID":"test-model","agent":"test-agent","finish":"stop","tokens":{"input":10,"output":5,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}},"parts":[{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_cursor_idle","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"this is a long response from the assistant","time":{"start":1000001,"end":1000002}}]}]

:api GET /session/ses_cursor_idle 200 {"id":"ses_cursor_idle","slug":"test","projectID":"proj1","directory":"/tmp/test-cursor","title":"Cursor Test","version":"1.0.0","time":{"created":500000,"updated":1000002}}

:api GET /session/ses_cursor_idle/todo 200 []
:api GET /session/ses_cursor_idle/diff 200 []

# Session becomes busy
:sse {"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_cursor_idle","status":{"type":"busy"}}}
:assert-busy

# Assistant starts streaming
:sse {"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_asst1","sessionID":"ses_cursor_idle","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1000000},"modelID":"test-model","agent":"test-agent","tokens":{"input":10,"output":5,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_step1","sessionID":"ses_cursor_idle","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"step-start","snapshot":"abc123"}}}
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_cursor_idle","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"","time":{"start":1000001}}}}
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_cursor_idle","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"this is a long response","time":{"start":1000001}},"delta":"this is a long response"}}
:assert-contains this is a long response

# Finalize text
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_cursor_idle","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"this is a long response","time":{"start":1000001,"end":1000002}}}}
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_step1_finish","sessionID":"ses_cursor_idle","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"step-finish","reason":"stop","tokens":{"total":100,"input":10,"output":5,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}

# Simulate user moving cursor into the message area to read
:eval (goto-char (point-min))
:eval (search-forward "long response")
:eval (setq test--cursor-before-idle (point))
:eval (setq test--cursor-in-msg-area (< (point) (marker-position (opencode-chat--input-start))))

# Now session goes idle — cursor should NOT jump to input
:sse {"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_cursor_idle","status":{"type":"idle"}}}
:sse {"type":"session.idle","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_cursor_idle"}}
:assert-idle

# Cursor must still be in the message area (before input-start), not snapped to input
:eval (should test--cursor-in-msg-area)
:eval (should (< (point) (marker-position (opencode-chat--input-start))))
# After refresh, "long response" text is still present; cursor should be near it
:eval (should (string-match-p "long response" (buffer-substring-no-properties (max (point-min) (- (point) 30)) (min (point-max) (+ (point) 30)))))
